title: antennaria rosea subsp. confinis
intro: Antennaria rosea subsp. confinis, also known as Elmer's greenthread, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is traditionally used as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal agent, making it a valuable medicinal plant. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including wounds, infections, and digestive problems, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, Antennaria rosea subsp. confinis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal benefits and promote overall health and well-being.
